exported_functions.name: Render
exported_functions.notes: Returns lines joined by \n; no trailing newline. Line order: header, match-count lines sorted by rule name, rejection-reason lines sorted alphabetically, evidence lines sorted by (ID, SourceSystem, EvidenceType).

internal_functions.name: renderEvidence
internal_functions.notes: Format: 'evidence id=<id> source=<SourceSystem> type=<EvidenceType> key=<Key> value=<Value> confidence=<%.2f>'

internal_functions.name: compareEvidence
internal_functions.notes: Sort key: ID first, then SourceSystem, then EvidenceType (via strings.Compare).

line_order: match_count lines: sorted by rule name ascending (slices.Sort on name strings)
rejection_reason lines: sorted alphabetically (slices.Sort on reason strings)
evidence lines: sorted by (ID ascending, SourceSystem ascending, EvidenceType ascending)
notes: Render is called after engine.Evaluate; it does not re-evaluate rules.
Confidence is rendered to two decimal places (%.2f); callers needing higher precision must format outside Render.
match_count lines are emitted only for keys present in Result.MatchCounts.
No trailing newline — output is strings.Join(lines, '\n').
Output ordering is part of the public contract; golden tests rely on it.
Evidence is cloned before sort so the input Result is not mutated.
